description: Complete system overview documenting the healthcare compliance platform architecture, key components, and integration points between HIPAA assessment, health monitoring, and security systems

Detailed documentation of core algorithms including HIPAA compliance scoring, healthcare security risk assessment, ransomware threat analysis, and impact calculations with their mathematical models and implementation details

Comprehensive documentation of healthcare-specific data models including HIPAA compliance assessments, security events, health monitoring metrics, and their relationships with emphasis on PHI protection requirements
Documentation of critical data flows and business processes including compliance assessment workflow, health monitoring pipeline, threat detection system, and impact analysis procedures

Detailed documentation of the healthcare security implementation including PHI protection mechanisms, HIPAA compliance validation, healthcare-specific threat detection, and medical data encryption patterns
